channel.title: Shivaramakrishna Srinivasan on shiva srinivasan
channel.description: Recent content in Shivaramakrishna Srinivasan on shiva srinivasan

item.title: Shivaramakrishna Srinivasan
item.description: Find me on LinkedIn Twitter GitHub Behance …or email me at shivaramakrishna.srinivasan@gmail.com

item.title: Shivaramakrishna Srinivasan
item.description: Hi! I’m a bioinformatics engineer and iGEMer looking for a challenging role in software development for computational and synthetic biology applications. I love solving problems with biology and spreading the word on how cool it is. In my spare time, I often find myself reading an article or listening to a podcast. I also enjoy sketching and going on long drives. If you appreciate good typography as much as I do, let’s be friends.

item.title: Shivaramakrishna Srinivasan
item.description: Front-End Angular React TailwindCSS Bootstrap Back-End and Databases NodeJS PHP mySQL Machine Learning / Deep Learning Can implement of neural nets and classic ML algorithms with TensorFlow, Keras Fluent in Numpy, sklearn and Pandas Data Visualisation libraries including D3, Seaborn, matplotlib Languages HTML CSS3 JavaScript Python R Java PERL UNIX shell scripting C/C++ Bioinformatics Tools AutoDock ViennnaRNA Galaxy Suite CAD tools for drug design GROMACS BLAST NGS tools Genetic circuit design tools Biopython BioJS DeepChem Cloud AWS Kubernetes Design Figma Sketch Adobe Illustrator Version Control Git Workflow Management Jira Trello Airtable Notion
